metadata.title: Summits and Conferences in Current Affairs MCQs

questions.question: Where was the 11th Commonwealth Parliamentary Association (CPA) India Region Conference 2025 held?
questions.explanation: Lok Sabha Speaker Shri Om Birla inaugurated the 11th Commonwealth Parliamentary Association (CPA) India Region Conference at Vidhana Soudha, Bengaluru. The three-day conference theme is “Debates and Discussions in the Houses of Legislature, building people’s trust, meeting people’s aspirations.” The Commonwealth Parliamentary Association (CPA) is an international platform of nearly 180 Commonwealth Parliaments and Legislatures. Shri Om Birla serves as the ex-officio Chairperson of the CPA India Region Executive Committee. India is the 9th Region of the CPA and includes 31 State and Union Territory branches.

questions.question: Where was the 1st Annual Green Hydrogen Research and Development (R&D) Conference 2025 held?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of New and Renewable Energy Pralhad Joshi inaugurated the 1st Annual Green Hydrogen Research and Development (R&D) Conference in New Delhi. The conference was organised by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) on 11–12 September 2025. It featured expert sessions, interactive roundtables, and a Start-up Expo showcasing India’s green energy revolution. 25 start-ups presented innovations in electrolyser manufacturing, Artificial Intelligence (AI)-driven optimisation, and biological hydrogen solutions. A ₹100 crore Call for Proposals was launched to support hydrogen innovation.

questions.question: Which Indian city is the host of 5th Coast Guard Global Summit (CGGS) 2027?
questions.explanation: Chennai will host the 5th Coast Guard Global Summit (CGGS) in 2027, the golden jubilee year of the Indian Coast Guard (ICG). The three-day summit will include an International Coast Guard Fleet Review and a World Coast Guard Seminar. It will serve as a global platform to discuss emerging maritime challenges and promote international maritime cooperation. The decision was taken unanimously at the 4th Coast Guard Global Summit (CGGS) in Rome on September 12, attended by delegates from 115 countries and organisations.

questions.question: Where was ‘National Agriculture Conference – Rabi campaign 2025’ held?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Union Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare held the two-day ‘National Agriculture Conference – Rabi campaign 2025’ at the Bharat Ratna C. Subramaniam Auditorium, Pusa Campus, New Delhi on September 15–16, 2025. The conference provided a platform for agriculture experts, scientists, policymakers, and senior state representatives to plan strategies and set production targets for the 2025–26 Rabi sowing season. The conference was chaired by Union Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan.

questions.question: Where was the National Women Empowerment Conference 2025 held?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Lok Sabha Speaker inaugurated a two-day National Conference on the Parliamentary and Legislative Committee on Empowerment of Women in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh. The conference highlighted the creation of several opportunities supporting women’s development. A law ensuring 33% reservation for women in legislatures was underlined as a key step toward empowerment. The conference concluded by adopting the ‘Tirupati Resolution’. The Tirupati Resolution outlined a roadmap for advancing women’s education, health, safety, dignity, and self-reliance toward Viksit Bharat by 2047.

questions.question: Which country is the host of third Global Artificial Intelligence (AI) Summit 2026?
questions.explanation: Recently, India announced it will host the third Global Artificial Intelligence (AI) Summit on 19–20 February 2026. The event will be organised by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) with focus on inclusive development, sustainability, and equitable growth. The summit’s logo, unveiled on 18 September, features the Ashoka Chakra with neural network patterns, symbolising AI’s impact across sectors. The summit continues the series of global AI meets after the 2025 AI Action Summit in France, 2024 in South Korea, and 2023 AI Safety Summit in the UK.

questions.question: Where was 28th National Conference on e- Governance (NCeG) 2025 held?
questions.explanation: Department of Administrative Reforms & Public Grievances (DARPG) and Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), in collaboration with Andhra Pradesh Government, are organising the 28th National Conference on e-Governance (NCeG) 2025. It is held on 22–23 September 2025 at Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. The theme of conference is ‘Viksit Bharat: Civil Service and Digital Transformation’. The conference promotes secure, sustainable, and innovative e-service delivery, advancing the vision of Viksit Bharat.

questions.question: Where was the 2nd National Mediation Conference 2025 held?
questions.explanation: The 2nd National Mediation Conference 2025 was held in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. The two-day event concluded with emphasis on mediation as a transformative tool for justice delivery and social harmony. Chief Justice of India (CJI) B.R. Gavai underlined the Mediation Act, 2023, elevating mediation as a credible pillar of the justice system. Mediation is key to speedy justice and reducing court burdens. Odisha positioned as a hub for legal innovation and alternative dispute resolution (ADR).

questions.question: Where was National Conference on Land Administration & Disaster Management held?
questions.explanation: The Department of Land Resources with the Revenue Department of Gujarat is organizing a National Conference on “Land Administration & Disaster Management”. The event is on 3rd and 4th October 2025 at Mahatma Mandir Convention Centre, Gandhinagar, Gujarat. It cover discussions on revenue laws, land records, resurvey, disaster management, and human resource planning.

questions.question: Which city is the venue of India-AI Impact Summit 2026?
questions.explanation: The Government of India unveiled the logo for India-AI Impact Summit 2026, scheduled on 19–20 February 2026 at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi. The Logo Design Contest was hosted on the MyGov platform from 28 May to 12 June 2025, receiving 599 entries. The winning design was submitted by Shri Ajith P. Suresh and selected by Emerging Technologies team under Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY). The logo features the Ashoka Chakra, symbolizing ethical governance, justice, and Constitutional values. The Summit, hosted by MeitY, will showcase AI’s role in inclusive development, sustainability, social progress, and innovations for humanity.
